MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2001 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's counsel appears, prior to the calling of the calendar, and presents a Stipulation for Judgment. Judgment signed. Matter off calendar - settled. Restitution of the premises at 475 Sunnydale Ave., San Francisco, CA, to plaintiff. Execution of judgment stayed until Jan. 01, 2002.
